title: 4. Needle SiMa 驷马 (88.17, 18, 19)
text:
The commonly used points for earache are CeSanLi and CeXiaSanLi. Some other points such as SanChaSan are
also good. SanChaSan treats diseases of the five sense organs, including the eye, ear, mouth, nose and skin. Point
Sima is also indicated in earache. If the earache is prolonged, bleeding therapy could be used to either SanChong
or SiHuaWai. Generally, when needling is not good enough, use blood-letting method.
